svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="prod-debug" id="proddebug"> <mxGraphModel dx="-554" dy="-163" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="/prod-debug：用三条铁律把生产调试锁成「只读」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="540" x="250" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="center" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="本地调试机
prod profile" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="440" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="生产 MySQL / Redis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="860" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec" edge="1" parent="1" source="center" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#16a34a;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="prod"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="只读连接" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="700" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="铁律①
不修改业务代码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="60" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="要改走 /pr-all 重走 CI
不准「顺手改一行」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="240" x="60" y="266" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="铁律②
不创建数据库迁移" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="400" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="Flyway out-of-order: false
schema 问题只读不写" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="240" x="400" y="266" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="铁律③
不触发 CD / 不重启线上" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="740" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="重启走 /deploy 带验证链路
排障不碰线上服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="240" x="740" y="266" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er1" edge="1" parent="1" source="r1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="center"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er2" edge="1" parent="1" source="r2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="center"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er3" edge="1" parent="1" source="r3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="center"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="高危操作停下问人
涉及大范围重构 / 架构改动 → 汇报等指示" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="540" x="250" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yunxiao" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#d97706;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="这一步 + 停下问人：都是云效流水线做不到的——流水线单向、无「询问」中间态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="800" x="120" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
